# Closing Price Cross Session

> Closing Price Cross (CPX) session enables market participants to trade in the central order book at the official closing price once determined. Introduces new Time in Force (TIF) of CPX for order direction, with two new trading sessions: Closing Price Publication (CPP) and Closing Price Cross (CPX). CPX session initially pilot-phase for segment ZA01 only.

**Category:** Trading · **Version:** 1.0 · **Tags:** equity-market · trading-session · order-management · closing-price

## What this does

Closing Price Cross (CPX) session enables market participants to trade in the central order book at the official closing price once determined. Introduces new Time in Force (TIF) of CPX for order direction, with two new trading sessions: Closing Price Publication (CPP) and Closing Price Cross (CPX). CPX session initially pilot-phase for segment ZA01 only.

Specifies 9 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **order_id** *(token, required)*
- **order_type** *(select, required)*
- **order_tif** *(select, required)*
- **order_price** *(number, optional)*
- **quantity** *(number, required)*
- **segment** *(select, required)*
- **session_status** *(select, required)*
- **published_closing_price** *(number, required)*
- **closing_price_has_decimals** *(boolean, required)*
- **order_status** *(select, required)*
- **amendment_type** *(select, optional)*

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **0** — when closing_price_published exists; cpp_session_completed exists; segment eq "ZA01", then move session_status cpp_session → cpx_session. _Why: CPX session begins after CPP completion and published closing price exists._
- **1** — when session_status eq "cpx_session"; order_tif in ["CPX","IOC","FOK","DAY","GTT","GTC","GTD"], then set order_status = "accepted". _Why: New orders with valid TIF types (CPX, IOC, FOK, DAY, GTT, GTC, GTD) are accepted during CPX session._
- **2** — when session_status eq "cpx_session"; order_type eq "MARKET"; order_tif in ["CPX","IOC","FOK","DAY","GTT","GTC","GTD"], then set order_status = "accepted_to_orderbook"; emit cpx.market_order_accepted. _Why: Market orders with valid TIF are accepted and converted to limit orders if not fully matched._
- **3** — when session_status eq "cpx_session"; order_type eq "LIMIT"; order_price eq "published_closing_price", then set order_status = "accepted_to_orderbook". _Why: Limit orders accepted only if price exactly matches published closing price._
- **4** — when session_status eq "cpx_session"; order_type eq "LIMIT"; closing_price_has_decimals eq true, then set order_status = "rejected"; emit cpx.limit_order_rejected_decimal_price. _Why: Limit orders rejected when published closing price contains decimals._
- **5** — when session_status eq "cpx_session"; order_tif in ["GFA","GFX","OPG","ATC"] OR order_type in ["STOP","STOP_LIMIT","HIDDEN_LIMIT"], then set order_status = "rejected". _Why: Specific order types rejected during CPX session._
- **6** — when session_status eq "cpx_session"; amendment_type eq "PRICE", then set amendment_status = "rejected". _Why: Price amendments rejected once CPX session begins._
- **7** — when session_status eq "cpp_session"; action_type eq "NEW_ORDER", then set action_status = "rejected". _Why: No new orders allowed during CPP session, only cancellations._
- **8** — when auction_completed exists; auction_extensions_resolved eq true, then move session_status continuous_trading → cpp_session. _Why: CPP session starts after closing auction or continuous trading completion._

## Errors it can return

- `CPX_SESSION_NO_CLOSING_PRICE` — CPX session cannot start - no published closing price available
- `CPX_INVALID_ORDER_TYPE` — Order type not allowed during CPX session
- `CPX_LIMIT_ORDER_PRICE_MISMATCH` — Limit order price does not match published closing price

## Connects to

- **equity-market-trading** *(required)*
- **order-management** *(required)*
- **circuit-breaker-system** *(recommended)*
